items.name: Elton John - Hollywood Star Suit
items.description:
Feel like a star in this flashy suit made by UGC Creator @Lovespun in homage to the outfit Elton John wore when he received his star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame. 

The suit comes with an Elton John Avatar Bundle and the look is completed with a pair of star-shaped glasses by @Blizzei and a star-studded pair of designer shoes. 

All items can be removed from the Avatar body so that you can mix and match to create a style all your own.
